member.name: T:IDADRS.NativeSearch.INativeSearchService
member.summary: Defines the managed contract for native-accelerated document search operations. Implementations may delegate to the native C library or fall back to managed equivalents when the library is unavailable.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.INativeSearchService.BmSearch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Searches for the first occurrence of in using a case-insensitive Boyer-Moore-Horspool algorithm.
member.param: The haystack string to search within.
member.returns: Zero-based character index of the first match, or -1 if not found.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.INativeSearchService.ScoreDocument(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Scores against using a simplified TF-IDF algorithm.
member.param: Full document text content to score.

member.name: P:IDADRS.NativeSearch.INativeSearchService.IsNativeAvailable
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the native library was loaded successfully. When , all methods use managed fallback implementations.

member.name: T:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchInterop
member.summary: Raw P/Invoke declarations for the native search_engine shared library. These are internal to the assembly; consumers use .

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchInterop.BmSearch(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32)
member.param: Length in bytes, or -1 to use strlen().
Length in bytes, or -1 to use strlen().
member.returns: Zero-based byte offset of first match, or -1 if not found.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchInterop.ScoreDocument(System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32)
member.param: Length in bytes, or -1 to use strlen().
Length in bytes, or -1 to use strlen().

member.name: T:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService
member.summary:
Production implementation of . Delegates to the native search_engine C shared library via P/Invoke.
Graceful degradation strategy: • On first call, a probe P/Invoke is attempted. • If , , or is caught, is set to and every subsequent call uses the managed fallback. • The fallback is correct but slower: BmSearch → with OrdinalIgnoreCase ScoreDocument → simple term-frequency counter (no IDF weighting)

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService})
member.summary: Initialises the service and probes for native library availability.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService.BmSearch(System.String,System.String)
member.remarks: Calls the native BMH implementation when available. Falls back to with otherwise.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService.ScoreDocument(System.String,System.String)
member.remarks: Calls the native TF-IDF scorer when available. The managed fallback counts term occurrences (TF only, no IDF weighting) and normalises by document length as a simple relevance proxy.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService.ProbeNativeLibrary
member.summary: Performs a cheap test P/Invoke call to detect whether the native library is loadable and the entry points exist. Returns if the probe succeeds without throwing.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService.HandleNativeFault(System.Exception,System.String)
member.summary: Handles a mid-operation P/Invoke failure: disables native calls for the remainder of the process lifetime and logs a warning.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService.IsPInvokeException(System.Exception)
member.summary: Returns for exceptions that indicate a P/Invoke infrastructure failure rather than a logic error.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.NativeSearchService.ManagedScoreDocument(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Managed TF-only document scorer used when the native library is unavailable.

member.name: T:IDADRS.NativeSearch.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods to register the native search service with the DI container.

member.name: M:IDADRS.NativeSearch.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddNativeSearch(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.remarks: Registered as singleton because: • The native library probe is done once at startup. • All methods are stateless after the initial probe. • P/Invoke calls are thread-safe in the C implementation.
